svg.title: HELM AI Kernel execution firewall blueprint - Animated Demo
svg.desc: An animated, blueprint-style architecture diagram showing model proposals entering the HELM policy boundary. Unpinned/unknown tool proposals fail closed and trigger Coral-colored quarantine DENY states with signed ProofGraph receipts. Schema-pinned tool proposals transition to safe Teal ALLOW states, execute their side-effects, and record verifiable audit receipts.

g.text: Open-source execution firewall for MCP and AI agents
DENY unknown tools before dispatch (Fail-Closed Quarantine)
ALLOW pinned schemas with receipts (Authorized Execution)
RECORD and verify all evidence offline via immutable ProofGraph
